item.title: Why Lua is good for beginners?
item.description:
Hello there! This is my first blog post about programming languages. Today’s topic is why you should learn Lua in 2025 and why it’s an excellent choice for beginners.

Introduction

If you haven’t heard of Lua, it’s a really small programming language. Maybe you have heard of it, but never had a reason to learn it because your preferred programming language already meets all your needs.

Lua is an open source language built on top of the C programming language. It is exclusively designed for embedded systems. It features dynamic typing, simple syntax and efficient memory management.

item.title: About
item.description:
Who is Kiyoshi Datto?

Hi there! I’m Kiyoshi Datto (aka Ha Nguyen Tien Dat or DatIT), a Vietnamese IT student. I love exploring new technologies in this rapidly evolving tech era. My “favorite” programming languages that I often (or not) use for projects: Javascript and Golang.

Why this page exists?

This website is an archive of all my projects, including both my schoolwork and the technologies I’ve discovered from the world out there. Additionally, the blog is where I share my tech knowledge and coding experiences.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Datto’s Archive respects your privacy. It does not:

  • Use cookies for tracking
  • Collect personal data
  • Share information with third parties
  • Use analytics software

This is a static site generated with Hugo. The server may log basic access information such as:

  • IP addresses
  • Browser information
  • Visited pages
  • Time and date

These logs are not used for tracking or identification purposes and are periodically deleted.

Contact

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact me at firehelper0609@gmail.com.
